<section begin="seo" />{{#seo:
|title=<%~ it.name %> Rarity
|description=<%~ it.seoDescription %>
|image=<%~ it.icon %>
|image_alt=<%~ it.name %> rarity icon
|twitter_card=summary
}}<section end="seo" />
<section begin="infobox" />{{Infobox rarity
|name=<%~ it.name %>
|api_name=<%~ it.apiName %>
|icon=<%~ it.icon %>
<% if (it.colorHex) { -%>
|color=<%~ it.colorHex %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.bgHex) { -%>
|background=<%~ it.bgHex %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.scrapResource) { -%>
|scrap_resource=<%~ it.scrapResource %>
<% } -%>
|upgrade_count=<%= it.upgradeCount %>
}}<section end="infobox" />

<section begin="costs" />
{| class="wikitable"
! Cost !! Value
|-
| Upgrade Scrip Cost || <%= it.upgradeScripCost %>
|-
| Upgrade Rare Resource Cost || <%= it.upgradeRareResourceCost %>
|-
| Cleanse Cost (Ouroboros) || <%= it.cleanseCost %>
|-
| Craft-New Saxonite Cost || <%= it.craftNewSaxoniteCost %>
<% if (it.additionalUpgradeCost) { -%>
|-
| Additional Upgrade Cost || <%~ it.additionalUpgradeCost %>
<% } -%>
|}
<section end="costs" />
<% if (it.hasUpgradesSection) { %>
<section begin="upgrades" />
<%~ it.upgradesSection -%>
<section end="upgrades" />
<% } -%>

<includeonly><section begin="categories" />
[[Category:Rarities]]
<section end="categories" /></includeonly>

[[Category:Auto-generated rarity source pages]]
